title: VerifySignatureResult
description: Result of `rebar verify-signature <ticket_id> --output json` (and the library verify_signature() / MCP verify_signature): a uniform verdict record. Every verdict carries the same base keys (manifest, step_count, algorithm, key_id, signed_at, head_sha) so consumers read them regardless of outcome; verdict is one of unsigned | foreign_key | certified | mismatch and verified is true iff certified. algorithm/key_id/signed_at/head_sha are null on an unsigned ticket. The not-found path emits an error_envelope instead (covered by ERROR_ENVELOPE).
